summary: Transparent app icons no longer show a white square on the Dock or installer, and the Uninstall Apps list shows every scanned application.
changed: App icons — remove inner white circle matte so only the blue logo shows on dark Dock and DMG backgrounds
fixed: Uninstall Apps — application list now renders after scan (139 apps visible instead of an empty panel)
Dock and installer icons — white background behind the logo removed in regenerated icon assets
